title: Efficiency Based Incentive System
problemStatement: Subjective performance reviews reduced transparency and created inconsistency in incentive decisions.
solution: Built a digital incentive platform to capture measurable contribution metrics and automate credit calculations, approvals, and review workflows.
impact: Improved fairness perception in incentive allocation and shortened approval cycles through data-backed evaluation.
leadershipValue: Converted a sensitive people process into a more transparent mechanism supported by measurable operating criteria.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Explore the workflow design for contribution scoring, approval flow, and incentive governance.
